creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 165053
Add METALINK option

Hi,

For a few versions, curl now proposes to support metalink files through libmetalink. I've written a patch to add the option of enable it in ftp/curl, would it be possible to consider commiting it?

One issue I found is that for an unknown reason, the curl binary requires explicit linkage with libcrypto, which was worked around with the option LIBS variable.

Thanks for your work,

-- Matthieu Volat
